race.description: Armidale Bowling Club/Club Quirindi Showcase Hcp
race.comment: HONNIBALL DRIVE (6) ran second on debut, then stuck on well in the heavy going to finish second over 1100m at Dubbo in the Silver Goblet. Well placed and can take this out with the 4kg claimer aboard. WHISKEYSIPPI RIVER (11) resumes after failing to get into the contest on debut when eighth at this track over 1000m on February 23. Two slick trial wins have her primed for this. BIG LON (2) resumes without a trial. Comes out of a fast run race on debut with a tiring second over 1100m at Dubbo on March 15. Talented gelding who must be kept safe. WRITE ME A LETTER (12) two-year-old Astern filly out of Take Aletter Maria on debut for the Cavanough yard. Was thereabouts in her two trials and has genuine place claims.
